name: chaingpt
description: The Web3 toolkit for Claude Code. AI-powered (ChainGPT chat / NFT / Solidity generator + auditor / crypto news / Solidity LLM) PLUS generic Web3: multi-chain wallet portfolios, token research, risk scanning, on-chain analytics, AI-enriched intel, MAINNET contract deployment with mandatory audit gate, MAINNET DEX trading (OpenOcean + Jupiter), MAINNET DeFi (Aave V3 + Lido + EigenLayer), MAINNET Hyperliquid perp data (positions, orderbook, funding), AND MAINNET Polymarket prediction-market data. 45+ audited Solidity patterns + zero-credit mock server. Custody-free.
